name: Aveyron (France)
description: A banner of the arms of the historic Rouergue (the département of Aveyron): a gold lion rampant on a red field.
history: The gold lion on red is the medieval arms of the counts of Rouergue, the historic province corresponding to the modern département of Aveyron.

features.symbolism: the arms of the historic county of Rouergue
